rows.text::eng: Others in the programme are submitting reports 📝. Submit yours now!
rows.text::my_ms: Fasilitator lain sedang menghantar laporan 📝. Hantar laporan anda sekarang!
rows.comment:
Based on social norm theory

Sent 1 hour after the module is completed but the report is not submitted. Clicking on the notification take them to the reports page with parent group selected.

rows.text::eng: Most facilitators are done ✅. Submit your report today!
rows.text::my_ms: Ramai fasilitator sudah selesai menghantar laporan ✅. Masa untuk hantar laporan anda!

rows.text::eng: Reports are coming in 💬. Share your report now!
rows.text::my_ms: Banyak laporan sedang diterima 💬. Kongsi laporan anda sekarang!

rows.text::eng: Join other facilitators 🧡. Submit your report to stay on track!
rows.text::my_ms: Sertai fasilitator lain 🧡. Hantar laporan anda untuk kekal ikut jadual!

rows.text::eng: Just one step left 🏁. Submit your report to finish strong!
rows.text::my_ms: Tinggal satu langkah lagi 🏁. Hantar laporan anda untuk habiskan dengan baik!

rows.text::eng: Final step 💪. Wrap up by sending your report today!
rows.text::my_ms: Langkah terakhir 💪. Selesaikan dengan menghantar laporan hari ini!

rows.text::eng: So close 📋. Send your report and complete your session!
rows.text::my_ms: Tinggal sedikit lagi 📋. Hantar laporan untuk lengkapkan sesi anda!

rows.text::eng: You’re nearly done ✨. Just send in your report!
rows.text::my_ms: Anda hampir siap ✨. Hantar sahaja laporan anda!

rows.text::eng: Others are moving forward 💬. Start your next chat session today!
rows.text::my_ms: Fasilitator yang lain sedang maju ke hadapan 💬. Mulakan sesi chat anda hari ini!

rows.text::eng: Most facilitators have begun their next chat ✅. Pick up where you left off!
rows.text::my_ms: Ramai fasilitator sudah mulakan chat seterusnya ✅. Teruskan sesi anda!
rows.comment:
Based on social norm theory

Sent 14 days after the last module was marked as delivered. Clicking on the notification takes them to sessions with parent group selected.

rows.text::eng: Facilitators are staying on track 📈. Begin your next session now!
rows.text::my_ms: Fasilitator lain sedang ikut jadual 📈. Jom mulakan sesi baru!

rows.text::eng: Many facilitators are continuing their chats 💬. Join in and start your next one!
rows.text::my_ms: Ramai fasilitator lain sedang aktif dengan chat 💬. Sertai fasilitator lain dan mulakan sesi anda!

rows.text::eng: You’re building strong progress 💬. Continue by starting your next session!
rows.text::my_ms: Kemajuan anda sangat baik 💬. Jom sambung sesi berikutnya!

rows.text::eng: Each session builds on the last ✨. Keep it going—start your next one now!
rows.text::my_ms: Setiap sesi saling melengkapkan dengan sesi yang lain ✨. Jom teruskan sekarang!

rows.text::eng: Great progress so far 💪. You’re getting closer—begin your next session today!
rows.text::my_ms: Anda memang hebat 💪. Teruskan dengan mulakan sesi baru!

rows.text::eng: One step closer to the finish line 🏁. Begin your next chat session today!
rows.text::my_ms: Selangkah lagi ke garisan penamat 🏁. Mulakan sesi chat seterusnya hari ini!
